🏖️ Best Beaches: Ionian Emeralds

BeachRatingTypeHighlights
Paleokastritsa⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐Coves/PebbleGrottoes & Caves
Porto Timoni⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐Double BayIconic Wild View

Canal d'Amour⭐⭐⭐⭐SandstoneUnique Rock Formations

📅 5-Day Venetian Odyssey Itinerary

Day 1: The Venetian Capital (~5km). Pickup car and enter the UNESCO heart. Walk the Liston promenade and the narrow 'Kantounia' alleys. Overnight in Corfu Town.
Day 2: Imperial Landmarks (~25km). Visit Sisi’s Achilleion Palace and the iconic Vlacherna Monastery at Kanoni. Great for plane-spotting and history.
Day 3: The Dramatic West (~45km). Drive to Paleokastritsa. Hire a boat for the caves, then hike to the double-bay of Porto Timoni for the island's best photo op.
Day 4: The North Coast (~70km). Explore the unique sandstone formations of Sidari and the upscale fishing village of Kassiopi. Catch the sunset at Loggas.
Day 5: The Sandy South (~65km). Drive south to the cedar forest and massive sand dunes of Issos Beach for a final swim before your flight.
💡 Pro Tip: Corfu's roads are winding and narrow. While distances look short on the map, the lush vegetation and mountain bends mean driving takes longer than you expect!
